summary: Retest after register-500 fix. CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED: POST /api/auth/register now returns 200 with access_token, refresh_token, and clean user object (id=uuid, NO _id/ObjectId leak). Frontend 3-step register flow (details -> OTP 123456 -> KYC -> auto-login) lands on /dashboard with success toasts. All previously-untested frontend pages (Recommendations, FinancialHealth, Analytics, AIChat) verified working. Logout clears session and redirects to /login.
passed: POST /api/auth/register 200 OK with access_token+refresh_token+user{id=uuid,...}, NO ObjectId leak (qa_user1@example.com)
Frontend Register 3-step flow: details -> reg-send-otp -> reg-otp-input(123456) -> reg-verify-otp -> reg-finish -> /dashboard (auto-login, 'Account created!' + 'Phone verified' toasts)

Frontend /recommendations renders all sections: Monthly Leaks banner (You could save ₹X), Overspending categories cards (EMI/Investment/Groceries), Subscriptions cards (Apollo, Myntra, etc.), Savings Opportunities (3 cards), SBI Products section
Frontend /health renders radial gauge (10 SVGs) + all 5 breakdown bars (savings_rate, expense_stability, emergency_fund, investment_activity, debt_ratio)
Frontend /analytics renders 5 recharts surfaces (monthly bars + category pie + savings trend line)
Frontend /ai-chat send 'How can I save money?' via chat-input + chat-send-button -> Gemini response appears (msgs 1->12)
Logout button clears session and redirects to /login
action_items: Note (minor): Chat route is /ai-chat (not /chat) - sidebar uses 'AI Co-Pilot' label; matches App.js routing. Not a bug.

Note (minor): Recommendations page shows loading text 'AI agents are analyzing your data…' for 5-10s while fetching /api/recommendations - consider adding a skeleton with section placeholders for better UX (non-blocker).
